title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, discusses his bootstrapping strategy that reached $10M ARR without external funding. The interview covers key operational decisions including churn reduction, product-led growth, SEO and AEO strategies, outbound sales, pricing experiments, and the decision-making framework for when to raise capital.
